subcategories.name: BASIC
subcategories.description: Samples based on Visual Basic, a widely used language.

subcategories.name: 1. Getting Started
subcategories.description: Some simple samples to get you started...

samples.name: HelloWorld
samples.description: Use a button to put up a 'Hello World' message.

samples.name: AddTwoNumbers
samples.description: Add two numbers and show the result.

samples.name: Benchmark
samples.description: Simple benchmark: How high can you count in one second?

samples.name: HelloWorld_Classic
samples.description: A simple Hello World app.

samples.name: HelloWorldArabic
samples.description: Hello World, in Arabic.

samples.name: HelloWorldHebrew
samples.description: Hello World, in Hebrew.

samples.name: HelloWorldJapanese
samples.description: Hello World, in Japanese.

samples.name: MobileFunctions
samples.description: Show orientation, standalone, online, browser detection and screen rotation.

samples.name: TwoForms
samples.description: Switch between two forms using a visual effect like fade or slide.

subcategories.name: Project1.appstudio
subcategories.description: No description is available.

subcategories.name: 2. Features
subcategories.description: Various features and techniques.

samples.name: AppScrollAbsolute
samples.description: Scrolling absolute controls with fixed header and footer.

samples.name: AppScrollFixedHeader
samples.description: Scrolling Container between fixed header and footer.

samples.name: AppScrollLongForm
samples.description: Make a form with scrollable content.

samples.name: BrowserArrows
samples.description: Use enableBrowserArrows for routing/navigation between forms using Navigo.

samples.name: Camera
samples.description: Display, rotate and email a picture from a camera.

samples.name: Classes
samples.description: Shows how to code a simple Person class.

samples.name: Clipboard
samples.description: Copy and paste to Input and Textarea controls.

samples.name: Collections
samples.description: Do VB-style collections in NSB/AppStudio. Collections are a powerful and easy way to organize data. In this sample, you'll spend more time looking at the source code than the actual output.

samples.name: CreateDiv
samples.description: Create a control at runtime, then destroy it.

samples.name: CustomFont
samples.description: Use a custom font in an app.

samples.name: DarkMode
samples.description: Automatically use Dark Mode if set by user.

samples.name: DragAndDrop
samples.description: Do a simple drag and drop.

samples.name: EULA
samples.description: Show EULA for an app. Put the EULA text into the project's EULA property and add the EULA control to your app.

samples.name: EventMania
samples.description: Show events from a screen touch. Run on an actual device: most of the events do not occur on the desktop.

samples.name: HeaderBodyFooter
samples.description: App with separate forms for Header, Body and Footer. Body can change to another form.

samples.name: iOSStyle
samples.description: Show iOS 7 features and style.

samples.name: MinecraftSim
samples.description: Shows what can be done with a PictureBox

samples.name: ModalForm
samples.description: Show a modal form.

samples.name: PopUpForm
samples.description: Shows how to do a pop up form.

samples.name: Print
samples.description: Use the Print statement for simple and more complex output.

samples.name: PrintForm
samples.description: Use window.print() to print a form to a printer. Not for Android.

samples.name: PWA
samples.description: PWA - Progressive Web App using cache and ServiceWorker

samples.name: ResponsiveRotation
samples.description: Use styleHeader media query for landscape and portrait layout.

samples.name: ScrollingForm
samples.description: What works (and does not work) on a scrolling form.

samples.name: Sort
samples.description: Sort array using default sequence or a user defined function.

samples.name: SplitView
samples.description: Displays two forms at the same time, side by side (Tablets).

samples.name: Swipe
samples.description: Use the touch events to capture screen gestures.

samples.name: VisualEffects
samples.description: Visual Effects, including fadeIn, fadeOut, slideDown and slideUp.

samples.name: WebShare
samples.description: Web Sharing and targetting

samples.name: WebWorker
samples.description: App with 2 threads, sending messages to each other.

subcategories.name: Device Features
subcategories.description: Using the hardware features of devices.

samples.name: Accelerometer
samples.description: Use the tilt of the device move a red ball around the screen. (Desktop systems don't have accelerometers, so they are not exciting when used with this sample.)

samples.name: AndroidVibrate
samples.description: Show Vibration function. Android only.

samples.name: Compass
samples.description: Show the current compass reading. (iOS)

samples.name: Geolocation
samples.description: Show the current location, altitude and speed. Should be run from a mobile device as desktop systems generally do not have GPS.

samples.name: GetUserMediaCamera
samples.description: Use getUserMedia to get a picture from the video stream.

samples.name: GoogleGlass
samples.description: Using Google Glass, tilt your head to move a red ball around the screen.

samples.name: Orientation
samples.description: Display an orientation warning. Add the orientation control to your project, then set the screenOrientation property in it.

subcategories.name: Saving Data
subcategories.description: How to save your data in storage or SQLite Database.

samples.name: IndexedDB
samples.description: Shows how to use IndexDB functions to save data.

samples.name: LocalStorage
samples.description: Simple demo of using localStorage.

samples.name: Northwind
samples.description: Deploy and display well known Northwind database.

samples.name: ReadAsText
samples.description: Use FileReader to read a file.

samples.name: SQLiteMadeSimple
samples.description: See Wiki article SQLite Made Simple

samples.name: SQLSample1
samples.description: Show SQLite creating, reading, importing, exporting and deleting. It uses JSON to turn the contents of the database into a string that can easily be imported or exported.

samples.name: SQLSample2
samples.description: Fill grid from SQLite. It also remembers its state, so if you stop and restart it, it will be exactly as you left it.

samples.name: SQLSample3
samples.description: SQL Master-Detail tables. Data returned is handled asynchronously.

subcategories.name: Sounds and Images
subcategories.description: How to save your data in storage or SQLite Database.

samples.name: Background
samples.description: Set and change form background. Also, capture clicks.

samples.name: Base64Image
samples.description: Draw image which has been loaded in a Base64 string.

samples.name: Emoji
samples.description: Emoji are special characters. Safari has the best selection.

samples.name: PlaySound
samples.description: Play .wav and .mp3 files.

samples.name: PlayTone
samples.description: Use PlayTone to play a note, chord and melody.

samples.name: RetinaHiRes
samples.description: Add retina display images to iOS project. For each file named xxx.jpg, you also need a xxx@2x.jpg file in your project and manifest. The appropriate image will be shown, depending on your device.

samples.name: Speak
samples.description: Use the Speak function for text to speech.

samples.name: SpeechSynthesisAPI
samples.description: Speech Synthesis sample: does more than Speak()

samples.name: Sprite
samples.description: Move a sprite across the screen. SetTimeout() and transform are used to update the position of the sprite.

samples.name: GetJSON
samples.description: Use getJSON to get data from a server

samples.description: Read a file, both locally and from a server. The app needs to be run from a server: it will not work in a local browser.
